Test Case Name: Add Row, Enter Burger, Save, and Verify Message
Workflow:
1. Navigate to the "https://practicetestautomation.com/practice-test-exceptions/" page. 
 2. Click on the "Add" button to add a new row.
 3. Verify the message "Row 2 was added". 
 4. Enter "burger" into the newly added row input field. 
 5. Click on the "Save" button. 
 6. Verify the message "Row added successfully".

Test Case Name: Remove Added Row and Verify Message
Workflow:
1. Navigate to the "https://practicetestautomation.com/practice-test-exceptions/" page. 
 2. Click on the "Add" button to add a new row.
 3. Verify the message "Row 2 was added". 
 4. Enter "burger" into the newly added row input field. 
 5. Click on the "Save" button. 
 6. Verify the message "Row added successfully".
 2. After adding a row and entering "burger", click on the "Remove" button next to the added row. 
 3. Verify the message "Row 2 was removed".
